body:
## Summary
- Add visible focus styling to inline citizenship requirement source rows.
- Add source guards for localized `Källa för` / `Source for` source-row labels, 48px source-row targets, and focus styling.
- Add mobile Swedish and desktop English browser checks for source-row labels, target size, wrapping/no overflow, and focus paint.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-citizenship-requirements-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "citizenship requirements|area source|sourceRefRow|target|localized"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 E2E_PORT=4189 NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/citizenship-requirements-checklist.spec.ts --workers=1 --grep "area source|Source for|Källa för|focus|44px|overflow"`
- `prettier --check app/citizenship-requirements.tsx tests/content-citizenship-requirements-parity.test.js tests/e2e/citizenship-requirements-checklist.spec.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`

Note: after the final rebase, I repeated the focused source test, typecheck, and diff check on commit `e3b0185e70e805856c53962f94e3e42b8e488e1c`.
title: Guard citizenship source row layout
